G

generateBill(Order, boolean) - Method in class clientGui.reservation.BillController
Generates a simulated bill based on the order ID.
generateHtmlReports(int, int, List<Order>, List<WaitingList>) - Method in class server.controller.MonthlyReportService
Main method to generate monthly reports.
generateQRCodeBase64(String) - Static method in class server.controller.QRcodeScanner
Generates a QR Code with a default size of 200x200.
generateQRCodeBase64(String, int, int) - Static method in class server.controller.QRcodeScanner
Generates a QR Code with custom width and height.
generateReportForPreviousMonth() - Method in class server.controller.MonthlyReportThread
Generates the report for the previous month.
generateUniqueConfirmationCode() - Method in class server.controller.OrderController
Generates a unique 4-digit confirmation code by ensuring it doesn't collide with any currently APPROVED order.
GET - Enum constant in enum class entities.ActionType
Generic retrieval action.
GET_ALL - Enum constant in enum class entities.ActionType
Retrieve all records of a specific resource.
GET_ALL_BY_SUBSCRIBER_ID - Enum constant in enum class entities.ActionType
Retrieve all records associated with a specific subscriber ID.
GET_ALL_LIST - Enum constant in enum class entities.ActionType
Retrieve the entire waiting list.
GET_AVAILABLE_TIME - Enum constant in enum class entities.ActionType
Verify specific available time slots before booking.
GET_BY_CODE - Enum constant in enum class entities.ActionType
Retrieve a record by a unique code (e.g., confirmation code).
GET_BY_ID - Enum constant in enum class entities.ActionType
Retrieve a specific record by its unique ID.
GET_MONTHLY_REPORT - Enum constant in enum class entities.ActionType
Generate or fetch data for the monthly management report.
GET_USER_ORDERS - Enum constant in enum class entities.ActionType
Retrieve order history for a specific user.
GET_WAITING_LIST_BY_DATE - Enum constant in enum class entities.ActionType
Retrieve the waiting list filtered by a specific date.
getAction() - Method in class entities.Request
Returns the action to perform.
getAction() - Method in class entities.Response
 
getActiveOrdersInTimeRange(Date) - Method in class DAO.OrderDAO
Retrieves guest counts for active orders within 2 hours of the requested date.
getActiveOrderSizes(Date) - Method in class DAO.OrderDAO
Retrieves sizes of active orders around the requested date (2 hour window).
getActiveOrderSizes2(Date) - Method in class DAO.OrderDAO
Retrieves the size (number of guests) of active orders that overlap with a 2-hour window starting from the requested date.
getAllCustomers() - Method in class DAO.CustomerDAO
Returns a list of all customers who are of type SUBSCRIBER.
getAllOpeningHours() - Method in class clientLogic.EmployeeLogic
Sends a request to get all opening hours.
getAllOpeningHours() - Method in class DAO.BusinessHourDAO
Retrieves all configured hours for the management view.
getAllOrders() - Method in class clientLogic.OrderLogic
Requests all orders from the server.
getAllOrders() - Method in class DAO.OrderDAO
Retrieves all orders from the database, joined with customer details.
getAllOrdersApproved(int) - Method in class DAO.OrderDAO
Retrieves all APPROVED orders for a specific subscriber code.
getAllOrdersWithCustomers() - Method in class DAO.OrderDAO
Retrieves all orders joined with customer data as a Map.
getAllSubscribers() - Method in class clientLogic.UserLogic
Requests all subscribers from the server.
getAllSubscribers(Request, ConnectionToClient) - Method in class server.controller.CustomerController
Retrieves all customers/subscribers from the database.
getAllTableCapacities() - Method in class DAO.TableDAO
Retrieves distinct capacity sizes available in the restaurant (all tables).
getAllTableCapacities2() - Method in class DAO.TableDAO
Retrieves capacity sizes of currently *unoccupied* tables only.
getAllTables() - Method in class clientLogic.TableLogic
Requests all tables from the server.
getAllTables() - Method in class DAO.TableDAO
Retrieves all tables from the database regardless of their status.
getAllWaitingList() - Method in class DAO.WaitingListDAO
Retrieves all waiting list entries joined with order details.
getAllWaitingListCustomer() - Method in class clientLogic.WaitingListLogic
Requests the entire waiting list.
getAllWaitingListWithCustomers() - Method in class DAO.WaitingListDAO
Retrieves all waiting list entries joined with customer details as a Map.
getAllWaitingListWithCustomersToFilter() - Method in class DAO.WaitingListDAO
Retrieves waiting list data joined with Orders and Customers, sorted by reservation date.
getApprovedOrdersByGuestCount(int) - Method in class DAO.OrderDAO
Retrieves APPROVED orders for a specific number of guests.
